mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_governor_stat_upload_stage WHERE transaction_id = CAST(#{transactionId} AS UUID)

DELETE FROM t_governor_stat target USING ( SELECT gvrnr_uid, MIN(record_dttm) AS start_dttm, MAX(record_dttm) AS end_dttm FROM t_governor_stat_upload_stage WHERE transaction_id = CAST(#{transactionId} AS UUID) GROUP BY gvrnr_uid ) stage_scope WHERE target.gvrnr_uid = stage_scope.gvrnr_uid AND target.record_dttm >= stage_scope.start_dttm AND target.record_dttm <= stage_scope.end_dttm
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_governor_stat ( gvrnr_uid, record_dttm, gvrnr_press1, gvrnr_press2, gvrnr_trnsps1, gvrnr_trnsps2, rgst_dttm, rgst_uid, updt_dttm, updt_uid ) SELECT stage.gvrnr_uid, stage.record_dttm, NULL, stage.gvrnr_press2, NULL, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{mbrUid}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{mbrUid} FROM t_governor_stat_upload_stage stage WHERE stage.transaction_id = CAST(#{transactionId} AS UUID)
